rationale: Both notes indicate strong topical and methodological overlap: the citing paper models brand-level CPG performance under price-war price changes with advertising/marketing controls and IV endogeneity handling, while the cited paper provides brand-level price and advertising elasticity evidence with comparable econometric treatment. Given this plausible role as a direct benchmark/theory source for price–advertising effectiveness (despite only DOI-level match evidence), this pair should not be dropped at triage.
